provenance.note: Distilled, reproducible snapshot from the deterministic pipeline engine run against synthetic fixtures. Not production telemetry; latency figures are representative reference timings, not live measurements.

structuredOutputValidity.method: Share of schema-validated stage-generation attempts (script/storyboard/asset-plan) that passed validation, across every brief and every retry (14/15 attempts).

retryIdempotencyCorrectness.method: Every retry produces a new, uniquely-identified job rather than mutating the failed/cancelled one, and the engine itself refuses retry from any other state.

endToEndCompletionTime.method: Mean representative reference latency across successfully completed runs — the engine itself runs in sub-millisecond time; this figure stands in for a live pipeline's wall-clock time.

estimatedVsObservedCost.method: Maximum difference between the pre-run cost estimate and the cost recomputed from final artifacts. Zero in fixture mode by construction — there is no live provider to introduce real variance; connecting one is where deviation would first appear.

seededFailureRecovery.method: Share of briefs seeded with a stage failure (a schema-invalid asset plan, a transient render error) that reach 'succeeded' via the documented retry path.
